description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a sleek, modern design with a predominantly matte black upper and bold orange accents. The shoe has a robust, thick black sole with sculpted geometric details, providing both style and support. Orange laces are threaded through reinforced eyelets, and an orange stripe runs along the side, curving upward toward the heel for a dynamic look. The collar and tongue are padded for comfort, with a visible orange pull tab on the tongue and a matching accent on the heel. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and mesh, offering durability and breathability. The overall construction suggests a focus on both urban fashion and functional performance.
description: A modern high-top sneaker in matte black with bold orange accents, thick sculpted sole, and orange laces. The design is sporty, stylish, and built for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange side stripe, sculpted sole, and detailed lacing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the orange laces, padded tongue with orange pull tab, and perforated toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible orange stripe and sole details, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, orange heel accent, and the back of the thick sole.
